channel.title: Sre Infra.Md on Alans Digital Twin Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Sre Infra.Md on Alans Digital Twin Blog

item.title: Sre_Infra
item.description:
🛠️ SRE & Infrastructure Hub

Welcome to the SRE Knowledge Map. Here, we dive deep into the Linux kernel, networking stacks, and the art of building stable, high-performance systems.

🚀 Performance & Kernel

Focus: Squeezing every drop of performance from the hardware.

  • CPU & Memory: [[articles/performance/cpu-numa|CPU Topology & NUMA Penalties]] → [[articles/performance/cfs-scheduler|CFS Scheduler Deep Dive]]
  • I/O Path: [[articles/performance/vfs-tracing|VFS & Page Cache Tracing]] → [[articles/performance/psi-metrics|PSI Pressure Metrics]]
  • Network Stack: [[articles/tcp-stack-deep-dive|TCP Stack Internals]] → [[articles/network-tuning-deep-dive|Network Tuning Guide]]
  • Observability: [[articles/ebpf-modern-observability|eBPF Modern Observability]]

📦 Container & Orchestration

Focus: The plumbing of modern cloud-native environments.
